Ready to start your project?

Leathertalks D2C Growth Strategy

19 Mar 2026
Code Visionary Services

Overview

Leathertalks, a growing D2C brand, approached us to break through stagnant growth and build a scalable, data-driven marketing engine. While the brand had initial traction, it struggled with low repeat purchases, inefficient customer acquisition, and disconnected data systems.

Our objective was clear: drive sustainable growth by optimizing acquisition, improving retention, and unifying customer data.

Client Details

Client: Leathertalks
Role: Performance Marketing & Retention Marketing Automation
Date: 20 Jan, 2024

The Challenge

Before our engagement, Leathertalks faced multiple growth bottlenecks:

Stagnant Sales Growth

Month-on-month growth was below 2%, with rising customer acquisition costs and difficulty scaling profitably.

Fragmented Customer View

Customer data was siloed across platforms like Shopify, Google Analytics, and email tools, making personalization ineffective.

Low Repeat Purchase Rate

Over 85% of customers never made a second purchase, leading to heavy reliance on first-time buyers.

Inefficient Marketing

Mass, broadcast-style campaigns resulted in low engagement, poor targeting, and an unsustainable LTV:CAC ratio.

Services Delivered

  • SEO
  • Performance Marketing
  • Retention Marketing
  • Marketing Automation

Our Approach

We rebuilt the entire growth engine by focusing on two core pillars: acquisition and retention.

1. Customer Acquisition Funnel

A structured, performance-driven funnel designed to bring in high-quality users.

  • Awareness (TOFU)
    Goal: 1M+ impressions/month
    Strategy: Targeted campaigns on Google and Meta to reach high-intent audiences
  • Consideration (MOFU)
    Goal: CTR > 2.5%
    Strategy: High-quality creatives and optimized landing experiences to build trust
  • Conversion (BOFU)
    Goal: CVR > 3%
    Strategy: Frictionless checkout and optimized user journey to maximize conversions
  • Key KPI:
    Maintain a LTV:CPA ratio of 3:1 for sustainable scaling

2. Retention & Lifecycle Marketing

We shifted the focus from one-time transactions to long-term customer value.

  • Built automated email & SMS flows based on user behavior
  • Implemented segmentation for personalized communication
  • Designed lifecycle campaigns (welcome, post-purchase, win-back)
  • Leveraged predictive analytics for smarter targeting

Technology Stack

We integrated a powerful marketing ecosystem:

  • Klaviyo – For event-triggered automation and predictive analytics (CLV, churn risk)
  • Mailchimp – For campaign management and communication flows
  • Zoho CRM – For centralized customer data and relationship management

The Solution

We created a unified, data-driven marketing system that connects acquisition and retention seamlessly:

  • End-to-end funnel optimization
  • Centralized customer data for better insights
  • Personalized, automated communication flows
  • Performance-driven ad strategies
  • Continuous optimization based on real-time data

Results

The transformation led to measurable improvements:

  • Significant improvement in customer acquisition efficiency
  • Increased repeat purchase rate and customer lifetime value
  • Better engagement through personalized communication
  • Optimized marketing spend with improved ROI
  • Strong foundation for scalable, long-term growth

Conclusion

By aligning performance marketing with retention strategies, we helped Leathertalks transition from inconsistent growth to a scalable, predictable revenue model.

This wasn’t just campaign optimization — it was a complete transformation of their growth strategy.
